tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using About To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: About To का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The train is about to leave. I am about to go to sleep. She is about to speak. It is about to rain. The meeting is about to start.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using About To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: About To का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I am about to leave home. She is about to cry. We are about to eat food. The sun is about to set. I am about to make this decision.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "वह अभी जवाब देने वाला है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "It are about to rain."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using About To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: About To का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I am about to apologize. They are about to arrive. I was about to make this mistake, but I stopped. She is about to fall asleep.
